meaning: n.侧面射进来的光线,侧灯,舷灯,拾零,杂闻,间接说明
examples: I think you will all like to get a little sidelight on English education.
Each door panel or sidelight panel will require two door panel rods or sash rods, for top and bottom rod pockets.
Climbing into an empty bed, Jim turns off the sidelight and watches the shadows huddling against the floral wallpaper.
So gold stock investing for the typical large capitalization equity manager is a peripheral sidelight.
Sidelight photos will be demanded, as well as witnesses and other courtroom-type evidence.
